description_long: This is a rustic, multi-unit wooden cabin complex set on a stone foundation, featuring several interconnected structures with pitched, reddish-brown gable roofs. The buildings are arranged in a linear fashion, with visible stonework at the base and wooden siding above. The roofs have moderate overhangs, and the complex includes a prominent staircase leading up to one of the entrances. Windows are small, rectangular, and asymmetrically distributed across the facades, with some grouped in pairs and others standing alone. The doors are wooden and blend into the siding, with at least one main entrance accessible via the staircase. The surrounding area is grassy, suggesting the cabin is situated in a natural or semi-rural environment.
description: A rustic, multi-unit wooden cabin complex with gable roofs, stone foundations, and asymmetrical windows, set in a grassy area.
description_view_0: This view shows the cabin from an angled perspective, highlighting the staircase, the stone foundation, and the arrangement of the interconnected buildings.
description_view_1: The front view displays the full width of the cabin complex, revealing the linear arrangement, multiple gable roofs, and the distribution of windows and doors.
description_view_2: This rear-angled view emphasizes the back side of the cabin, showing fewer windows and the continuation of the stone foundation.
description_view_3: A side view that showcases the length of the cabin complex, the alignment of the roofs, and the extended stone base.
attribute_roof_type: gable roofs with moderate overhangs, constructed from reddish-brown wooden shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple small, rectangular windows arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped in pairs and others isolated across the facades
attribute_door_placement: at least one main wooden door accessible via a staircase on the front facade, with other doors distributed along the length of the complex
